evals.name: review-uncommitted-changes
evals.prompt: review my uncommitted changes before I commit — I've been refactoring the auth module all morning
evals.expected_output: Should launch all 3 reviewers (codex-review.py, /review, /simplify) in parallel with 'uncommitted' scope, all as background tasks.

assertions.text: Launches /review skill via a background agent
assertions.description: Should spawn a background Agent that invokes the /review skill on the same uncommitted scope

assertions.text: Launches /simplify skill via a background agent in report-only mode
assertions.description: Should spawn a background Agent for /simplify that returns findings as text, not applying edits

assertions.text: All three reviewers launched in the same turn
assertions.description: Codex, /review, and /simplify must be launched in a single message — not sequentially

assertions.text: Ends turn after launching, does not proceed to cross-validation
assertions.description: Skill says to end turn immediately after launching all three background tasks

evals.name: review-branch-diff
evals.prompt: audit my feature/payment-v2 branch against main — I'm about to open a PR and want a thorough review
evals.expected_output: Should launch all 3 reviewers with branch diff scope (--base main) in parallel.

assertions.text: Uses branch scope with --base main for codex-review.py
All reviewers use the same branch diff scope
assertions.description: All three reviewers must review the same scope — branch diff against main

assertions.text: Launches all three reviewers as background tasks
assertions.description: All three should be run_in_background: true — Codex as background Bash, others as background Agents

evals.name: review-specific-commit
evals.prompt: check commit a1b2c3d — it touched the database connection pooling logic and I want to make sure nothing regressed
evals.expected_output: Should launch all 3 reviewers with commit scope using SHA a1b2c3d.

assertions.text: Uses commit scope with SHA a1b2c3d for codex-review.py
All reviewers use the same commit scope
assertions.description: All three reviewers must review the same commit SHA, not uncommitted changes or branch diff

assertions.text: Does not ask user to clarify scope
assertions.description: Commit SHA is explicitly provided — should not ask what scope to review
